description: Mexican criminal organization commanded by veteran drug lord Rafael Caro Quintero, founded in 2019. Concentrates drug trafficking operations in the border area of Caborca Municipality, Sonora. Engaged in a bloody dispute with Los Salazar, an armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel, and allied with the Juárez Cartel to dispute territories in Sonora and Chihuahua. Despite Caro Quintero's capture in 2022, the cartel remains active.
